title: Acquisitive prescription
doc_html:
§2288.  Acquisitive prescription

The tax sale certificate and the act by which an acquiring person obtains full ownership constitute just title for purposes of acquisitive prescription.

Acts 2008, No. 819, §1, eff. Jan. 1, 2009.
doc_text:
§2288.  Acquisitive prescription
The tax sale certificate and the act by which an acquiring person obtains full ownership constitute just title for purposes of acquisitive prescription.
Acts 2008, No. 819, §1, eff. Jan. 1, 2009.
